namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::System.Linq.IQueryable<global::Demo.PersonDto> Project(global::System.Linq.IQueryable<global::Demo.Person> src)
    {
        if (src is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(src));
        return global::System.Linq.Queryable.Select(src, __s => new global::Demo.PersonDto
        {
            Home = __s.Home == null ? null : new global::Demo.AddrDto { City = __s.Home.City },
            Name = __s.Name,
        });
    }
}
